items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Family/household add-ons', but the evidence provided does not include any specific details or endpoints that confirm this requirement. The linked use case mentions various membership features but does not explicitly address family or household add-ons, leading to an inconclusive status. Without concrete evidence or references to how this requirement is satisfied, it cannot be determined if the requirement is met.
